---
# ── EXERCISE SHEET TEMPLATE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Copy this file's front matter into your topic's exercises.qmd.
# Replace all values marked with ← EDIT.

title: "Topic Title — Exercises"               # ← EDIT
topic-key: "algebra"                           # ← EDIT
topic-title: "Algebra"                         # ← EDIT
institution: "Gymnasium — Mathematics"         # ← EDIT

# Landscape is default (optimised for screens and tablets)
# Set to false for portrait (better for printing)
exercise-landscape: true
exercise-blank-pages: true
exercise-show-sections: true
exercise-reset-per-chapter: true

format:
  typst:
    toc: false
    papersize: a4
    include-before-body:
      - path: ../../shared/styles/exercises.typ

filters:
  - ../../shared/filters/extract-exercises.lua
---

```{=typst}
#setup-exercises("algebra", "Algebra", "Gymnasium — Mathematics", landscape: true)
#let p = get-palette("algebra")
```

{{< include lecture.qmd >}}
